status.prompt: Create a 12-second video. Pixar-style 3D animation in the visual tone of Coco. Rio the tropical toucan with a vibrant orange-and-yellow beak sits at a small wooden coffee shop table across from a friend (off-camera). Warm cozy lighting, plants in the background, latte steam rising. Beat 1 (0-5s): Tight close-up of Rio's face, his eyes look at the friend's left eye, holding for a beat. Beat 2 (5-10s): His gaze drifts gently to the friend's right eye, holds, then drifts down to the friend's mouth. Beat 3 (10-15s): The triangle continues — back up to the left eye, hold, soft attentive expression throughout. No speech, just soft acoustic café music and ambient murmur. Tight close-up of Rio's face the entire time. Subtle camera push-in over the 15 seconds. Keep the story complete within the requested duration. Avoid text overlays, subtitles, logos, watermarks, abrupt cuts, and visible glitches.
